Welcome to Git Sandbox TerminalType  help to list available commands.$ git$ git initInitialized empty Git sandbox repository.$ git commit -m "init"Created commit c1$ git branch featCreated branch feat$ git switch featSwitched to branch 'feat'$ git commit -m "feat: add docs"Created commit c2$ git switch mainSwitched to branch 'main'$ git merge featFast-forward$ git log --onelinec2 feat: add docs

scenarios.title: Merge conflict
scenarios.terminal:
Welcome to Git Sandbox TerminalType  help to list available commands.$ git$ git initInitialized empty Git sandbox repository.$ git commit -m "init baseline"Created commit c1$ git switch -c featCreated and switched to new branch 'feat'$ (데모) 편집기 자동 입력(데모) 편집기 자동 입력$ git commit -m "feat: add toolbar"Created commit c2$ git switch mainSwitched to branch 'main'$ (데모) 편집기 자동 입력(데모) 편집기 자동 입력$ git commit -m "main: add metrics"Created commit c3$ git merge featAuto-merging... CONFLICT (content)$ git statusOn branch main + HEAD -> main (c3)
You have unmerged paths.
  (fix conflicts in the editor and then run "git commit")$ git log --onelinec3 main: add metrics
c1 init baseline
